title: Akhandalamani Temple
tagline: Akhandalamani Temple — spiritual town of Odisha

overview.short: Akhandalamani Temple (pronounced [akʰɔɳɖɔlɔmɔɳi]) at Aradi village, Odisha, India, is dedicated to Lord Shiva (Baba Akhandalamani).
overview.description: Akhandalamani Temple (pronounced [akʰɔɳɖɔlɔmɔɳi]) at Aradi village, Odisha, India, is dedicated to Lord Shiva (Baba Akhandalamani). Aradi is about 37 kilometres (23 mi) away from Bhadrak.

topPlaces.name: Laddu Baba Temple
topPlaces.description: Laddu Baba Temple is a Hindu temple dedicated to Shiva worshipped as Laddukeshwar but affectionately called Laddu Baba in the town of Sharanakula in Nayagarh district of Odisha, India. The temple dating back to medieval times shows a fusion of Kalinga and Dravidian temple architecture.

topPlaces.name: Sarankul
topPlaces.description: Sarankul is a small town under the district Nayagarh of Odisha.

items.note: Laddu Baba Temple is a Hindu temple dedicated to Shiva worshipped as Laddukeshwar but affectionately called Laddu Baba in the town of Sharanakula in Nayagarh district of Odisha, India. The temple dating back to medieval times shows a fusion of Kalinga and Dravidian temple architecture.
Sarankul is a small town under the district Nayagarh of Odisha.

faq.q: What is the best time to visit Akhandalamani Temple?
faq.a: The best time to visit Akhandalamani Temple is Oct – Mar. Summers are 26–40°C and winters are 12–28°C.

faq.q: How do I reach Akhandalamani Temple?
faq.a: The nearest airport is Biju Patnaik International Airport, Bhubaneswar (75 km) and the nearest railway station is Puri Railway Station (77 km). Roads are generally good; check seasonal/monsoon conditions before high-altitude or remote stretches.

faq.q: How many days are enough for Akhandalamani Temple?
faq.a: 2 days are usually enough to cover the top attractions of Akhandalamani Temple at a relaxed pace.

faq.q: How much does a hotel cost in Akhandalamani Temple?
faq.a: Stays in Akhandalamani Temple start from ₹900 per night, with options across 4 price categories.

faq.q: What are the top places to visit in Akhandalamani Temple?
faq.a: The top attractions are Laddu Baba Temple, Sarankul.
